title: canscora sessiliflora
intro: Canscora sessiliflora, also known as 'Shilajit', is a type of plant that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and adaptogenic properties. The health benefits of Canscora sessiliflora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving immune function, and increasing energy levels. Herbal preparations of Canscora sessiliflora include teas, capsules, and tablets, which are often used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
